# Anthony & Pam Bollinger Ministries

> Husband-and-wife duo from Bruce, MS sharing oldies, country, and gospel music. Book Anthony & Pam Bollinger for your church, theater, or event.

Anthony & Pam Bollinger are a Southern gospel and oldies duo based in Bruce, Mississippi. Their ministry blends classic oldies, country, and gospel music with personal testimony about what God has done in their lives. They perform at churches, theaters, and events across the region. Their signature song is "I'm Living Proof."

## Pages

- [Home](/): Full site including Our Story, What We Play, Watch & Listen, and booking information.
